name: Delete Route53 Resolver Query Log Config
description: Simulates an attacker deleting a Route53 Resolver query logging configuration, eliminating DNS query visibility that is essential for detecting C2 communication and data exfiltration over DNS.
prerequisites: Route53 Resolver query log configuration (stratus-red-team-dns-log-config) attached to a VPC
detection_signal: route53resolver:DeleteResolverQueryLogConfig — eliminating DNS visibility is a strong defense evasion indicator
